title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
